title: Reading Values from a Bar Graph

steps.work: X-axis: fruit names. Y-axis: number of students (scale by 2s).
steps.explanation: The x-axis shows categories, the y-axis shows values.

steps.instruction: Find where the Apples bar reaches on the y-axis.
steps.explanation: Follow the top of the bar horizontally to the y-axis.
The tallest bar represents the most popular choice.

title: Finding Totals from a Bar Graph

steps.explanation: Read each bar carefully against the scale.
Adding all bars gives the total data points.
